name: WIMSR
description:
WIMSR

WIMSR prepares nuclear data libraries for the WIMS-D and WIMS-E thermal reactor assembly codes. It reads a GENDF tape (output from GROUPR) and produces a formatted WIMS library containing multigroup cross sections, scattering matrices, resonance integrals, and fission product data.

Key features:
  • Supports WIMS-D (iverw=4) and WIMS-E (iverw=5) library formats
  • Predefined 69-group WIMS structure or custom group structures
  • Goldstein lambda factors for intermediate resonance treatment
  • Burnup chain data for transmutation and depletion
  • Current (P1) weighting spectrum option
tooltip: Prepare WIMS-D/WIMS-E library data from multigroup GENDF tapes.

parameters.name: ngendf
parameters.help:
'ngendf'

Unit for input GENDF tape (from GROUPR).

parameters.name: nout
parameters.help:
'nout'

Unit for output WIMS library.

parameters.name: mat
parameters.help:
'mat'

Material to be processed. Select the isotope and the MAT number will be chosen automatically.

parameters.name: iverw
parameters.help:
'iverw'

WIMS library version: 4 for WIMS-D format, 5 for WIMS-E format.

parameters.name: igroup
parameters.help:
'igroup'

Group structure option. 0 for standard 69-group WIMS structure, 9 for custom group structure.

parameters.name: ntemp
parameters.help:
'ntemp'

Number of temperatures to process (0=all on GENDF tape).

parameters.name: nsigz
parameters.help:
'nsigz'

Number of sigma-zero values to process (0=all on GENDF tape).

parameters.name: sgref
parameters.help:
'sgref'

Reference sigma-zero value (barns). Infinite dilution = 1e10.

parameters.name: ires
parameters.help:
'ires'

Resonance data option. 0=process all groups, 1=resonance groups only.

parameters.name: sigp
parameters.help:
'sigp'

Potential scattering cross section (barns). Used when ires=1.

parameters.name: mti
parameters.help:
'mti'

MT number for incoherent inelastic thermal scattering (0=none).

parameters.name: mtc
parameters.help:
'mtc'

MT number for coherent elastic thermal scattering (0=none).

parameters.name: ip1opt
parameters.help:
'ip1opt'

P1 scattering option: 0=use P1 matrices from GENDF tape, 1=use transport correction.

parameters.name: inorf
parameters.help:
'inorf'

Resonance fission option: 0=include resonance fission, 1=exclude.

parameters.name: isof
parameters.help:
'isof'

Fission spectrum source: 0=from GENDF tape, 1=use material-specific chi.

parameters.name: ifprod
parameters.help:
'ifprod'

Fission product flag: 0=not a fission product, 1=fission product.

parameters.name: jp1
parameters.help:
'jp1'

Number of current (P1 flux) spectrum values. 0=no current weighting.

parameters.name: lambdas
parameters.help:
'lambdas'

Goldstein intermediate-resonance lambda factors. For the 69-group structure, 13 values are needed (for resonance groups 14-26). For custom structures, nrg values are needed.

parameters.name: iburn
parameters.help:
'iburn'

Burnup data flag: 0=no burnup data, 1=include burnup chain data.

parameters.name: ngnd
parameters.help:
'ngnd'

Total number of energy groups (required when igroup=9).

parameters.name: nfg
parameters.help:
'nfg'

Number of fast groups (required when igroup=9).

parameters.name: nrg
parameters.help:
'nrg'

Number of resonance groups (required when igroup=9).

parameters.name: igref
parameters.help:
'igref'

Reference group for flux ratio (optional, only when igroup=9).

parameters.name: iprint
parameters.help:
'iprint'

Print flag (0=min, 1=max).

(default=min)

parameters.name: rdfid
parameters.help:
'rdfid'

Real (floating-point) material identifier for WIMS library. Defaults to MAT number.
